title: Indulgent Irish Floral Pudding
description: A rich peanut brittle-infused pudding with a velvety, tempering-chocolate topping, perfect for a special treat.

ingredients.name: Fresh hibiscus flowers
ingredients.notes: dried or frozen as a substitute

instructions: Combine peanut brittle and dark chocolate in a food processor until well-crushed.
In a medium saucepan, whisk together Irish cream, sugar, and egg yolks.
Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until mixture thickens and coats the back of a spoon.
Remove from heat and stir in coconut cream, butter, and honey.
Strain mixture into individual serving cups and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
Just before serving, top each pudding with a layer of tempered chocolate.
Temper chocolate by heating it to 105°F (40°C), then cooling it to 80°F (27°C) before using.
Garnish with fresh mint leaves, berries, and a pinch of sea salt.
Serve chilled, with a side of fresh hibiscus flowers for garnish.
Refrigerate any leftovers for up to 3 days.
Freeze for up to 2 months and thaw overnight in the refrigerator before serving.
